errors.message: revision history does not start with a version of `0` or `1` when sorted by date (was `3`)
missing revision history item with number `1` before `2023-08-22T10:00:00.000Z`
missing revision history item with number `2` before `2023-08-22T10:00:00.000Z`
missing revision history item with number `4` between `2023-08-22T10:00:00.000Z` and `2024-01-21T11:00:00.000+06:00`
items must be in ascending order when sorted by `date` and `number`
